
### printf manpage  {.smaller}


* For <code>%n</code>: 

   * The  number  of  characters  written so far is <em>stored into the integer pointed to by the corresponding argument</em>. That argument shall be an <code>int *</code>, or variant whose size  matches the  (optionally)  supplied  integer  length  modifier.

* <code>%hn</code> --- expect <code>short *</code> instead of <code>int *</code>
